name: Recruiter: Archive a PROJECT (testing tool)
description: Testing-only: archives an entire LinkedIn Recruiter project. Navigates /talent/projects, locates the project by id (its /talent/hire/<id> link) or name, opens its overflow '…' menu, clicks 'Archivar proyecto'/'Archive project', confirms, and verifies it left the active projects list. Params: project_url (and/or project_name).
